visual_identity: dreamy synth anime noir within dark cyber noir anime with neon magenta and cyber pink dominance
song_motif: tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles

color_palette.rule: limited-color cyber anime palette: neon magenta/cyber pink dominant, deep plum/dark violet shadows, graphite gray/near-black backgrounds, subtle icy cyan reflections only, and silver-white highlights

recurring_symbols: tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles
lighting_language: strobing but controlled cyber-pink accents on beat peaks, airy pads, soft bloom, slow neon trails, glassy reflections, deep plum shadows, graphite darkness, silver-white rim highlights
transition_language: beat-matched impact cuts and fast reflection wipes through tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles, neon reflections, and airy pads, soft bloom, slow neon trails, glassy reflections
